meaning: social-media editor; page admin; creator of online content (often used
sentence: 小编整理了十个最实用的生活小技巧。
pinyin: Xiǎo biān zhěng lǐ le shí gè zuì shí yòng de shēng huó xiǎo jì qiǎo.
english: The editor has put together ten of the most practical everyday tips.

sentence: 这辆卡车后面拖着一节挂车，装满了货物。
pinyin: Zhè liàng kǎ chē hòu miàn tuō zhe yī jié guà chē, zhuāng mǎn le huò wù.
english: This truck is towing a trailer behind it, loaded with goods.

sentence: 妈妈红烧的带鱼特别香，我每次都能吃好几块。
pinyin: Māma hóng shāo de dài yú tè bié xiāng, wǒ měi cì dōu néng chī hǎo jǐ kuài.
english: Mom's braised hairtail fish smells amazing — I can always eat several pieces.

meaning: public institution; (Tw) business enterprise; company; firm
sentence: 她在一家事业单位工作，福利待遇很好。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā shì yè dān wèi gōng zuò, fú lì dài yù hěn hǎo.
english: She works at a public institution that offers very good benefits.

sentence: 既往的事就不要再提了，向前看才重要。
pinyin: Jì wǎng de shì jiù bù yào zài tí le, xiàng qián kàn cái zhòng yào.
english: Don't bring up past things anymore — looking forward is what matters.
